description: Your site's highly-trafficked cornerstone article, 'Global Climate Report 2024', was accidentally moved to the Trash. Worse, an intern tried to recreate it by making a new blank draft with the exact same title. Because WordPress ensures unique URLs, this new draft has stolen the SEO-critical URL slug (`global-climate-report-2024`). Restore the original 'Global Climate Report 2024' post from the Trash and resolve the slug conflict with the intern's duplicate draft so the restored post is Published with the exact URL slug `global-climate-report-2024`. Create a new category called 'Featured Research' and assign the restored 2024 report to it. Edit the 'Global Climate Report 2023' post to include a hyperlink to the 2024 report (http://localhost/global-climate-report-2024/) and add the tag 'Climate Data' to both the 2023 and 2024 reports.
